commit.message: Fix typos in style and formatting
Merge branch 'master' of https://github.com/openjdk/jdk into JDK-8358560-unique-node-list

Replace type of `orig_phis` and `phi_list`

All tier 1, 2, and 3 HotSpot JTreg tests (in FastDebug config).
Update references in macro.cpp and macro.hpp
Fixed style issue in pointer variable declaration

8358560: Use `Unique_Node_List` in place of `GrowableArray<Node*>`

This patch is a minor cleanup of the code in escape.cpp and gcm.cpp.
Wherever the code calls `GrowableArray<Node*>::append_if_missing()` and
when the order of the insertions doesn't matter, this patch instead uses
`Unique_Node_List::push()`, since such insertions are asymptotically
faster than those due to `GrowableArray`, which has the scan the entire
array prior to insertion.
